Programs

Learning that grows with your child.

From preschool through 5th grade, our mixed-age Montessori classrooms develop the whole child.

Ages 2+

Preschool

Monday – Friday · 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

8100 Winthrope Street, Oakland, CA

Our preschool program immerses young learners in the Montessori method, building independence, curiosity, and a love of learning from the earliest years.

In the Dragonfly and Butterfly classrooms, children explore purposeful work across six core areas, guided by educators who honor each child's natural development.

Curriculum Areas

Practical Life
Sensory Exploration
Cultural Studies
Geography
Mathematics
Language Arts

Our classrooms.

Dragonfly

preschool

Preschool / Transitional Kindergarten

Butterfly

preschool

Preschool / Transitional Kindergarten

Hummingbird

elementary

Kindergarten / 1st Grade

Falcon

elementary

Dolphin

elementary

4th / 5th Grades

TK – 5th Grade

Elementary

Monday – Friday · 8:30 AM – 3:30 PM

6925 Chabot Road, Oakland, CA 94618

Our elementary program blends Montessori methodology with social justice curriculum rooted in BIPOC cultures. Students think deeply, pose questions, and solve real-world problems.

Mixed-age classrooms are intentional — older students mentor younger ones, building empathy, leadership, and shared community.

What Students Learn

  • ✦ Decolonized history — precolonial civilizations, modern social justice movements
  • ✦ Advanced literacy — 90% exceed national benchmarks
  • ✦ Project-based STEM with design thinking
  • ✦ Arts — visual arts, music, recording studio sessions
  • ✦ Social-emotional development and conflict resolution
  • ✦ Civic engagement and community participation

Summer 2026

Summer Camp.

Ages 5–9 · June 15 – August 7, 2026

Monday – Friday, 8:30 AM – 3:00 PM · Aftercare available until 5 PM

6925 Chabot Road, Oakland

Pricing

Per week $475
Aftercare add-on +$100/week
Multi-week discount (3+ weeks) 5% off
Sibling discount 5% off

Includes 1.5 hours of morning mathematics daily to prevent summer learning loss.

Inquire About Summer Camp

Pear Tree Community School

A social justice Montessori school in Oakland serving preschool through 5th grade. No family will be turned away.

Campuses

8100 Winthrope St (Preschool)

6925 Chabot Rd (Elementary)
